log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
REASONING: Power Word Stun on Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster (HP 67 ≤ 150). Auto-stun!
--- Water Genasi — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 15

→ Lich: WIS save [d20:11+9=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.
